name: The Sepulchral Guard
inspire: Immediately after giving a friendly fighter a Raise token, Inspire that fighter. After giving friendly fighters three or more Raise tokens, Inspire your leader ({icon:leader}).

abilities.name: Forward!:
abilities.rulesText: Pick your leader ({icon:leader}) to use this ability if they have no Charge tokens. Pick up to 2 other friendly fighters. Those fighters immediately Move.

abilities.name: Arise!:
abilities.rulesText: Pick your leader ({icon:leader}) to use this ability if they have no Charge tokens. Pick up to 2 slain friendly fighters. Raise those fighters and place them on different empty starting hexes in your territory.

abilities.name: Grasping Hands
abilities.flavorText: Though their muscles are long rotted, the grip of the Guard is the grip of death.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after you pick a target as part of an Attack. That target is Surrounded for that Attack. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Startling Reformation
abilities.flavorText: The Sepulchral Warden is never far behind his cursed minions…
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Remove your leader ({icon:leader}) from the battlefield and place them in an empty hex adjacent to 2 friendly fighters. Then, give your leader ({icon:leader}) a Charge token. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Bone Shrapnel
abilities.flavorText: The decrepit warriors of the Sepulchral Guard shatter in a shower of sharp flinders.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after a friendly fighter with no Raise tokens is slain by a melee Attack made by an enemy fighter. Inflict 1 damage on that enemy fighter. You can only use this ability once per game.
